name: python3-pydantic-core
title: python3-pydantic-core
summary: Rust implementation of pydantic core functionality (Python 3 module)
description:
Rust implementation of pydantic core functionality (Python 3 module)
pydantic uses type hinting (PEP 484) and variable annotation (PEP 526) to
validate that untrusted data takes the desired form. There is also support for
an extension to dataclasses where the input data is validated.
.
The core library is implemented in Rust and up to seventeen times faster than
the original pure Python implementation.
.
This package installs the Python 3 module.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-pydantic-core because Rust implementation of pydantic core functionality (Python 3 module).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-pydantic-core as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-pydantic-core with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-pydantic-core --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
